creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
nivit       2007-01-21 20:19:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/py-wsgiutils   Makefile pkg-descr 
  Added files:
    devel/py-wsgiutils/files pkg-deinstall.in pkg-install.in 
  Removed files:
    devel/py-wsgiutils   pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Added devel/py-setuptools as dependency
  - Bumped PORTREVISION
  - Fixed the issue with packing list, when you have
    previously installed setuptools on the system
  - Fixed a typo in pkg-descr
  - Replaced pkg-plist with PLIST_FILES
  
  PR:             ports/107613
  Submitted by:   Nicola Vitale <nivit at email.it>
  Approved by:    alexbl (mentor, implicit), maintainer timeout (15 days)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +12 -2     ports/devel/py-wsgiutils/Makefile
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/devel/py-wsgiutils/files/pkg-deinstall.in (new)
  1.1       +16 -0     ports/devel/py-wsgiutils/files/pkg-install.in (new)
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/devel/py-wsgiutils/pkg-descr
  1.2       +0 -16     ports/devel/py-wsgiutils/pkg-plist (dead)
